newer_content: The database has been migrated to PostgreSQL 14.

older_content: The API server runs on port 3000.
newer_content: The API server now runs on port 8080.
Authentication uses session cookies after the security audit.
The cache was migrated to Valkey after the Redis license change.
Deploy was migrated from Docker Swarm to Kubernetes.

older_content: The default embedding model is multilingual-e5.
newer_content: The default embedding model was changed to BGE-M3 after benchmarking.
CI was migrated from Jenkins to GitHub Actions.
The message broker was replaced with Kafka for higher throughput.
The search backend was replaced with OpenSearch after the fork.
The frontend was rewritten in React 18.
Rate limit was lowered to 60 req/min after the DDoS incident.
The storage backend was migrated from S3 to GCS.
Python 3.12 is now the runtime after the upgrade.
The ORM was replaced with Prisma after switching to TypeScript.

older_content: The monitoring stack is Prometheus + Grafana.
newer_content: Monitoring was moved to Datadog after the SRE decision.
The team also uses daily standups on Slack.

older_content: We use TypeScript for the frontend.
newer_content: We use TypeScript with strict mode for the frontend.

older_content: The project is open source under MIT.
newer_content: The project remains open source under the MIT license.
Code review still requires two approvals from senior engineers.
Documentation continues to be written in Markdown format.
Winston is used as the primary logging framework.
